title: Effective dates
doc_html:
§3697.  Effective dates

All benefit changes shall be prospective only unless stated otherwise in the Act.  Statutory benefit changes shall not apply to members who have already retired.

Acts 2011, No. 399, §1, eff. July 1, 2011.
